name: Prakash Shrestha
profileSummary: Prakash Shrestha is a renowned Nepali singer known for his contribution to the Nepali music industry. He has recorded over 1,000 songs and released 12 albums in cassette and CD formats. With more than 500 performances both nationally and internationally, he is also the most recorded artist in the Nepali film industry, having sung playback songs in over 150 Nepali films.
